subcodes.first_line: O noble branch of the divine Lote-Tree! Some time ago, regarding condolences for the branch of the blessed Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الجلیل من السدره الرحمانیه در چندی پیش در تعزیت فرع شجره مبارکه
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @personal instructions, @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
